BEGIN: Click mouse or touch screen to begin.
COLOR_GAME_INTRO: Now we are going to play a game. This is the color game. In the color game, all the blue ones go here.
COLOR_GAME_REDS: and all the red ones go here
DEMO_BLUE_HERE: See, here's a blue one. It goes here.
RULE_BLUE_HERE: If it's blue it goes here
RULE_RED_THERE: but if its red it goes there.
RED_WHERE: Now here's a red one. Where does this one go? Click on or touch the right place.
INCORRECT: Incorrect. If it's blue it goes here
BLUE_WHERE: Now here's a blue one. Can you sort it correctly?
VERY_GOOD_COLOR: Very good. You know how to play the color game
YOUR_TURN_COLOR: Now it's your turn. So remember, if it's blue it goes here, but if it's red it goes there.
RED_PROMPT: Here is a red one. Where does it go?
BLUE_PROMPT: Here is a blue one. Where does it go?
SHAPE_GAME_INTRO: Now, we're going to play a new game. We're not going to play the color game anymore. We're going to play the shape game. In the shape game, all the rabbits go here.
SHAPE_GAME_BOATS: And all the boats go there.
SHAPE_RULE_RABBIT: Remember, if it's a rabbit, put it here.
SHAPE_RULE_BOAT: but if it's a boat put it there. Okay?
RABBIT_PROMPT: Here is a rabbit. Where does it go?
BOAT_PROMPT: Here is a boat. Where does it go?
BORDER_INTRO: Okay, you played really well. Now I have a more difficult game for you to play. In this game, you sometimes get cards that have a black border around it like this one.
BORDER_COLOR_RULE: If you see cards with a black border, you have to play the color game. In the color game, red ones go here
BORDER_COLOR_DEMO: This card is red, so I'm going to put it right there
BORDER_SHAPE_RULE: But if the cards have no black border, like this one, you have to play the shape game. In the shape game, if it's a rabbit, we put it here
BORDER_BOAT_RULE: but if it's a boat, we put it there
BORDER_SHAPE_DEMO: This one's a rabbit, so I'm going to put it right here. Okay? Now it's your turn.
SWITCH_PROMPT: If there's a border, play the color game. If there's no border, play the shape game
